subcodes.title: Words to Aseyeh Allen spoken in May 1907
subcodes.first_line: Man is dependent. God is independent. Man is weak. God is strong... So, God is, and although He expresses Himself through man, still if He had not created man, He would BE just the same.
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @absolute freedom; independence of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
